title: wardenplus
description: Warden,Warden,and more Warden,This mod adds many Wardens.
body: This mod introduces a devastating two-phase boss mob: the Warden Plus. Evolving beyond the standard Warden, it becomes the "Void Monarch" at low health, gaining immense power and new abilities. It commands ultimate elemental attacks like meteor showers, tsunamis, and lightning storms, supported by spectacular particle effects and custom sounds. Designed for end-game players seeking a supreme challenge, this boss features aggressive AI, epic visuals, and a fight that requires top-tier gear and strategy. Are you ready to face the monarch?
